content:
# Rotating Disk Experiment

**Summary**: A method used to determine dissolution rates and diffusion coefficients of fluids reacting with solid surfaces.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017]] used rotating-disk-experiment to calculate the reaction rate and diffusion coefficient (De) of emulsified acids at HPHT conditions.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The calculation of De for oil-saturated limestone showed two distinct values based on whether the system was mass transfer or surface reaction limited. ([[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017, p. 103]])
